releases.summary: Smarters replay fix, xtream-masters EPG, live stream UX and logging improvements.
changelog: Fix Smarters replay on same channel (max-connections reconnect for same IP+stream)
HLS remux replaces prior session per viewer on channel replay
EPG All Countries switched from iptv-org to xtream-masters.com/epg feeds
EPG Channel Map: channel_id renamed to Stream ID in UI and CSV export
Remove Direct source option from live streams (movies/series only)
Stream logs: show HLS relay errors, stream names, and empty-state hints
Dark theme: fix unreadable stream names in Manage Streams table

releases.summary: Monolithic mode: auto port sync on save, extra HTTP/HTTPS listeners, panel-driven RTMP, --monolithic installer.
changelog: Edit Server / Settings save auto-runs sync-panel-ports (nginx + UFW, no manual sync step)
Advanced tag ports generate extra nginx listen blocks (HTTP stream edge + HTTPS)
RTMP vhost generated from server rtmpPort (install-nginx-rtmp.sh)
Installer --monolithic: main server row + local stream agent on same host
Remote servers: save queues agent Push config instead of panel nginx edits

releases.summary: Audit fixes: TS errors, PM2 dedupe, marketing licensing routes, full smoke audit script.
changelog: Fix download playlist web player button (open prop shadowing window.open)
Fix HLS MPEG-TS relay and live stream TypeScript errors
PM2 restart dedupes orphan nexlify workers after mode switches
Marketing: licenses/validate + whmcs API routes; licensing exports restored
scripts/full-audit-smoke.sh for vendor/customer health checks

releases.summary: Fix Smarters empty LIVE TV when logging in on HTTPS 443; publish bootstrap script.
changelog: server_info.port now matches the port clients use (443 for HTTPS domains, not forced 8080)
Smarters no longer redirected to blocked :8080 after successful HTTPS login
Publish has-valid-next-build.sh to nexlify.live/install/scripts/ (fixes bootstrap 404)
Marketing install guide: Smarters use port 443 on domains, port 80 on IP installs

releases.summary: One-click installer ships full IPTV port fix; auto nginx + UFW on every install and update.
changelog: Installer runs installer-finalize-ports.sh (nginx start, stream edge, UFW 22/80/443/8080/1935/554)
Fast update applies port sync after every panel upgrade
Install complete shows IPTV/Smarters URL and stream port in credentials
Marketing installer v177; fix-stream-edge-now.sh published to nexlify.live/install/
Publish script ships all port scripts with tarball and one-click installer

releases.summary: Permanent IPTV port fix — firewall, nginx stream edge, and sync on install/deploy.
changelog: Central port registry + nexlify-firewall-ports.sh opens 22, 80, 443, 8080, 1935, 554
sync-panel-ports.sh: .env, nginx stream edge, UFW, and verify — runs on install and deploy
Installer opens all IPTV ports automatically (skip with --skip-firewall)
Admin → Settings → Server: Sync ports & firewall button + port checklist
Stream port changes persist to .env and regenerate nginx on sync

releases.summary: Fix Smarters empty categories, port 8080 stream edge, and Xtream server_info.
changelog: Invalidate Xtream category cache when lines or bouquets change (fixes empty LIVE TV after setup)
Ship nginx stream edge on :8080 with installer + UFW rule
Xtream server_info.port advertises stream HTTP port (8080) for HTTPS panels
IP-only installs use port 80 for Xtream (not 8080) in server_info and env

releases.summary: Smarters category fix, XUI-style manage streams, dashboard monitor, and server install UI.
changelog: Verify the Stream panel on Manage Streams (Active Servers, Stream Sources, Recent Errors)
Dashboard resource monitor with CPU/memory/network charts and service status
XUI-style server installation wizard with live install log
Backup source URL field on stream edit; failover when primary probe fails
Xtream get_live_categories scoped to line bouquets (fixes empty Entertainment category in Smarters)

releases.summary: HLS→MPEG-TS remux for IPTV Smarters (.ts live URLs).
fixes: IPTV Smarters playback error on HLS channels — /live/…/id.ts now streams real MPEG-TS via ffmpeg remux
HLS segment relay allows CDN hosts beyond the root manifest domain

releases.summary: Full HLS relay for direct-source channels — fixes play-then-stop on Smarters.
changelog: HLS segments and sub-playlists now proxy through the panel instead of hitting upstream CDN directly
Stream logs show live viewers and HLS relay errors for direct-source channels (no ffmpeg process)
fixes: BBC ONE and other HLS direct channels stopping after a few seconds in IPTV Smarters
Empty stream logs for direct relay channels — live viewer activity now visible

releases.summary: Panel UX polish, update-banner fix, and IPTV Smarters HLS playback fix.
changelog: Streaming Servers nav — Engine, Transcoding Studio, and Health moved below Cache / Redis
Panel UI zoomed out to 1-Stream / XUI-style density
Update complete banner no longer reappears after Reload now
fixes: IPTV Smarters playback errors on HLS channels (BBC ONE, etc.) — panel serves HLS manifest instead of redirect
Xtream direct_source no longer bypasses panel with raw upstream URLs
Completed panel updates auto-clear from server after dismiss or reload

releases.summary: Enterprise feature packs: GPU transcoding, intelligent LB, archive, security shield, analytics AI, DVR, marketplace.
changelog: Transcoding Pro Pack — NVENC/VAAPI/QSV GPU ladders, 4K/HEVC, auto-fallback profiles
Intelligent LB Pack — health-check failover, geo + bandwidth-aware routing
Archive & Timeshift Pack — EPG-linked recording, 7–30 day retention, HLS/DASH output
Security Shield Pack — IPQualityScore + MaxMind, VPN/proxy/datacenter auto-block, webhooks
Analytics + AI Pack — churn prediction, regional rankings, SSE real-time monitor
DVR Pack + expanded client portal (password, devices) + PWA manifest + marketplace
fixes: Geo LB and intelligent LB now wired into live playback routing
Connection geography feeds analytics dashboards

releases.summary: Full WebRTC stack, geo LB, reseller guards, line templates, and safe updates.
changelog: Full WebRTC playback via MediaMTX WHEP — sub-second to ~3s latency with HLS fallback
WebRTC player page, ICE/TURN settings, install-mediamtx-webrtc.sh for stream servers
Geo-aware load balancing routes playback to nearest edge server
VPN auto-blocklist, connection geography analytics, FFmpeg transcode profiles
Line templates, sub-reseller max-lines and bouquet enforcement
Safe panel updates with automatic rollback (v1.6.4+)
fixes: Customer panel offline after failed auto-update
Geo LB countries on servers were not used during playback

releases.summary: Safe panel updates: automatic rollback and recovery if build fails — panel stays online.
changelog: Updates back up .next before building and restore the previous build if npm run build fails
New panel-update-recover.sh — auto rollback, rebuild, and restart after interrupted updates
Health watchdog and panel-restart-safe.sh call recover when .next is missing
Failed updates always attempt recovery so the panel is not left offline at 82%
fixes: Panel went offline when auto-update stopped PM2 and deleted .next but build never finished
Repeated crash on customer VPS during v1.6.0 → latest update attempts

releases.summary: Panel update progress: live build sub-steps, elapsed time, and faster VPS builds.
changelog: Update banner shows elapsed time, typical step duration, and completed steps checklist
Build progress now streams live from Next.js (compiling, generating pages, standalone packaging) instead of stuck at 82%
Settings → Updates page shows the same detailed sub-progress
VPS builds skip TypeScript type-check during update for faster npm run build
fixes: Progress bar appeared frozen at 82% during npm run build even though the update was still running

releases.summary: Manage UI polish: server actions, line downloads, bouquets, sub-resellers, and Add Server improvements.
changelog: Manage Servers: larger Actions button with full menu — easier to tap on desktop and mobile
Manage Lines: expanded Download line menu — M3U file download, EPG, Stalker, web player, Enigma2, copy credentials
Add Server: example placeholders and primary network interface auto-suggested from existing servers
Manage Streams: dedicated XUI table at Content → Streams
Manage Bouquets: XUI-style table with search, pagination, and quick enable/disable
Sub-resellers: richer admin table with credits, lines, group, status, and actions
fixes: Server action menus no longer clipped inside data tables

releases.summary: XUI-style content management: servers, streams, movies, series, and episodes overhaul.
changelog: Manage Servers: expanded action menu (health, LB, connections, enable/disable, mark online), table default view, server tree removed
Main panel server auto-marked online on fresh installs
Manage Streams / Movies / Series: XUI toolbar with search, category & status filters, bulk enable/disable/delete, row actions
Manage Episodes: full table with series/season filters and bulk delete
Add Episode & Add Series: collapsible sections matching Add Movie layout
Manage Streams split view: mass edit and stream health shortcuts
Webplayer CORS + demo playback fix for panel.nexlify.live lines

releases.summary: Major v1.6.0: Anti-Sharing & Scalability, Advanced Monitoring, Mass Operations, Migration Tools, and Security hardening.
changelog: ActiveCode / Device-Bound Authentication: bind subscriptions to specific device IDs for strongest anti-sharing protection
Stream Fingerprint / Invisible Watermarking: trace leaks back to individual subscribers with unique tokens
Same-IP / Multi-Login Detection + Auto Actions: real-time detection with auto-ban, disable, or notify
Load Balancer Shared State: unlimited LB sessions with shared state across all load balancers
TMDB Auto-Sync: automatic metadata, posters, descriptions, seasons/episodes for Movies & Series
Mass Edit / Bulk Operations: bulk update, enable, disable, delete, assign bouquets on Lines, Streams, Movies, Series, MAG/Enigma devices
Auto M3U Sync + Auto Channel Mapping: one-click sync from provider URLs with automatic channel-to-EPG mapping
Advanced EPG Auto-Assignment: mass auto-mapping with 95%+ accuracy target, multiple sources, improved cron UI
Auto Issue Fixing: smart analyzer detects audio loss, loops, freezes, and applies zero-downtime source swapping
Real-time Down Source Monitoring + Alerts: health checks, bitrate monitoring, SourceMonitorAlert notifications
Apps Lock: restrict subscriptions to specific player apps (iOS, Android, Web, MAG, Enigma, SmartTV, Kodi)
Reseller API Keys: official external API with granular permissions and IP whitelisting for reseller automation
xDrive / Encrypted Cloud Backup: encrypted backups with S3/GCS/Azure/xDrive support and configurable retention
Server Cleaner: automated maintenance tasks (orphaned streams, expired lines, old logs, temp files, DB vacuum, broken streams)
Custom Expiry Videos: branded messages when lines expire, suspend, or run low on credits
Migration Tools: automated import from Xtream UI, XUI, NXT, WHMCS with selectable item types
Connection Geography: live connections world map with country, region, city, bandwidth tracking
Stream Health Dashboard: per-stream health checks with response time, bitrate, audio/video tracks, freeze/loop detection
Live VideoLog: real-time viewer activity logging per stream and line
fixes: Prisma schema expanded with 19 new models for v1.6.0 features
Middleware now enforces Apps Lock and Device Binding on all playback paths
Load Balancer session sharing uses explicit relation names to prevent ambiguity
All new admin settings pages include search, filters, bulk actions, and CSV export

releases.summary: Full audit fixes, sidebar navigation improvements, EPG real data, App Builder APK generation, and safe PM2 restart.
changelog: Sidebar navigation: renamed 'Created Channels' to 'Create 24/7 Channel', added Import M3U link, removed EPG Guide Browser
Sidebar pathActive: parent categories no longer highlight when on action pages (add, edit, settings, etc.)
Manage Lines: wrapped in form with autoComplete=off to prevent Google password save prompts
EPG sources: updated URLs to .xml.gz format, fixed 404 errors
EPG Calendar: now shows real program data from Prisma EpgProgram database instead of mock data
Manage Streams: added search toolbar, stream count display, improved selected stream header layout
VOD content: redesigned with 3 professional cards (Movies, TV Series, VOD Proxy)
App Builder: added AppBuild Prisma model with real queue/download APK generation flow
PM2 restart: added kill_timeout, wait_ready, listen_timeout for cluster mode stability
Standalone output: Next.js build now uses output: 'standalone' for optimized deployment

New settings pages: Server Guard, Performance Core, Auto Fix, LB Redirect, Cloud Backup, Server Cleaner, VOD Proxy, Apps Lock, Stream Analyzer, Source Swap, Source Monitor, Prefix Manager, Batch Manager, Expiry Videos, Disk Monitor
fixes: Orphaned next-server process holding port 13000 causing PM2 EADDRINUSE crashes — fixed with pm2-restart.sh cleanup script
Browser cache showing old sidebar content after updates — added cache-busting via version bump
EPG calendar date navigation and time-slot display improvements
Updates page now shows correct latest version and release notes

releases.summary: Safe panel restart after auto-updates — panel no longer goes offline when updates finish.
changelog: panel-restart-safe.sh: nexlify-only restart during updates (does not kill nexlify-cron)
Background update worker runs in setsid so it survives PM2 recycle
Minute health watchdog auto-restarts panel if nexlify is down
fixes: Auto-update no longer leaves /login unreachable after the pm2 restart step
fix-panel-restart.sh one-shot upgrade for existing installs

releases.summary: Fix Settings → Updates crash when loading release notes from nexlify.live.
changelog: Normalize marketing and panel release feed formats in fetchNexlifyReleasesFeed
Fall back to bundled panel-releases.json when remote feed fails
Marketing /api/panel-releases now serves canonical panel format
fixes: Settings → Updates no longer throws when release entries lack changelog/fixes arrays

releases.summary: Manage streams UX, built-in DDoS shield, source probe on Add Stream, and automatic tarball updates for all panels.
changelog: Manage Streams under Live / Radio / Channel with split layout and verify panel
Check / probe source on Add Stream before saving
Built-in DDoS shield on playback and Xtream API paths (Security settings)
Automatic panel updates for tarball installs via apply-panel-fast-update.sh
Hourly auto-update cron applies new releases when enabled (default on)
fixes: Stream source URL normalization (https:/ typo) on save and probe
Manage streams and legacy /admin/streams routes unified under /admin/content/streams

releases.summary: IPTV playback, EPG export, migration discoverability, and installer hardening for all customer VPS types.
changelog: xmltv.php EPG export for subscriber lines (portal + players)
/movie/ proxy routes public for integration VOD in M3U
Fix Xtream server_info port to match nginx public URL (not :8080/:3000)
ABR multi-bitrate M3U entries use authenticated /live/ URLs
Adult content restriction enforced on playback
Demo sandbox blocks player_api, get.php, live, movie, stalker, xmltv
Reseller streaming-info: correct Stalker URL (load.php)
Panel migration + M3U import in admin sidebar
One-click installer v161: login redirect fix, license env, smoke tests
fixes: Portal subscriber URLs use correct public origin behind nginx
portal.php redirects to /portal
Installer no longer sets STREAM_HTTP_PORT=3001 on panel-only VPS

releases.summary: Configure-ready polish, website 50% coupon popup, portal billing links, and operator tooling.
notes: Marketing site: NEXLIFY50 coupon popup (50% off, 30 redemptions) on nexlify.live.
Run npm run db:seed or upsert coupon NEXLIFY50 on production after deploy.
Demo panel (panel.demo) blocks all mutations except login/logout.
changelog: Website 50% coupon popup with remaining uses, session dismiss, and register/pricing re-show
Coupon API: public GET status, atomic redemption on checkout, NEXLIFY50 seed (30 max)
PayPal Orders v2 create-order API wired to billing settings
Features page: honest Included vs Roadmap matrix for v1.5.3
Subscriber portal: renew/top-up links, M3U download, EPG link, ticket create
i18n: login, portal, and key settings strings in en, es, fr, ar
White-label: reseller group logo and accent on login and panel shell
Fix panel update auto-download toggle persistence
XUI modules: profiles list, hmac/hmacs to API docs, recording to webhooks, mag_events and videolog live
MAG/Enigma add forms: MAC normalization hints
Stream health browser: clients, logs link, one-click error fix
Server install wizard: certbot and sysctl hints
Full backup: ZIP/gzip export, S3 env placeholders, scheduled cron setting
EPG cron fetches SchedulesDirect and WebGrab+ configured sources
ABR variant ladder hints in Xtream live stream entries
Commission report: CSV export and date range filter
Reseller SMS on low credits via subscription notify cron
Demo panel read-only API guard: POST/PUT/PATCH/DELETE blocked except login
PostgreSQL pg_dump cron script and admin settings doc link
Stream agent upgrade path documented in server settings
fixes: Panel Updates page no longer forces auto-download on every load

releases.summary: SMS and Telegram alerts, subscriber portal, coupons, stream failover, and a full operator feature set.
notes: Configure Twilio and Telegram under Settings before enabling SMS or ops alerts.
Subscribers can log in at /portal with line username and password.
Run prisma db push on the VPS after deploy for new Coupon and LeakAuditLog tables.
changelog: SMS notifications: Twilio settings plus automated expiry, renewal, suspension, and low-credit alerts
Multi-device add-ons: extra device slots on packages applied to line maxConnections
Enhanced notifications: email, SMS, and in-panel alerts wired to cron and billing webhooks
Catch-up/DVR: archive presets and polished archive page
EPG: SchedulesDirect and WebGrab+Plus source types with URL templates
ABR auto-switch: stream setting plus Xtream abr_auto_switch server_info flag
Auto-fix dead links: cron probes streams, restarts failures, uses backup URLs
Security: enforce 2FA for resellers, leak audit log, playback token TTL, geo docs
Telegram monitoring alerts for offline streams, high load, and abuse
Stream health dashboard with probe status and connections per channel
Usage reports and reseller commission/profit report pages
Coupons: Prisma model, admin CRUD, checkout validation API
PayPal settings placeholder and billing coupon hook
White-label: reseller group logo, accent color, support email
i18n scaffold: en, es, fr, ar with top-nav language switcher
Subscriber portal at /portal with expiry, bouquets, player setup guides
Stream backup URL failover in resolve-stream-url
Cloud backup: full JSON export and settings restore upload
Scheduled tasks settings UI for EPG, channel refresh, and dead-link probes
Marketing /features comparison page on nexlify.live

releases.summary: What's new modal after panel updates and synced release notes across panel and website.
notes: After updating or reloading, admins see a What's new popup for the installed version.
Release notes are synced from one source to the panel API and nexlify.live.
changelog: What's new modal: pops once per version after a panel update or first admin login on a new version
Synced release feed: single panel-releases.json drives panel API and marketing site updates page

releases.summary: XUI-style VOD import, sidebar persistence, expanded settings, and panel update reliability.
notes: Import Movies and Import Series default to M3U/URL with dual-list selection and TMDB auto-fetch.
Sidebar sections stay expanded when navigating; no more collapsing the active category.
Panel update polling is lighter; the Updates page no longer hangs on a full reload during background jobs.
changelog: Import Movies & Series: XUI-style bulk import: M3U/URL default, dual-listbox picker, auto category, direct source, TMDB auto-fetch, bouquets, preview
Sidebar category persistence: expanded groups saved in session storage across navigation
Sub-reseller help: descriptive guidance on groups and admin sub-reseller list
Streaming settings: on-demand probesize with auto recommended value (128000 bytes)
Cache & Redis: expanded TTL options, key prefix, maxmemory guidance, flush-on-update toggle
TMDB settings: fallback language, import auto-fetch, cache TTL, operator notes
Panel update UX: lightweight job polling API, fetch timeouts, immediate progress after start
fixes: Panel update no longer blocks Updates page on please-wait during background jobs
Sidebar accordion no longer collapses the active category on every route change

releases.summary: In-panel notifications, reseller alert widget, server tree, on-demand imports, and branding fixes.
notes: After upgrading, use Admin → Updates or apply-panel-fast-update.sh for fast patch deploys.
M3U channel imports default to on-demand; uncheck on the import form for 24/7 live restreaming.
changelog: In-panel notification system for admins and resellers
Streaming servers server tree on Manage Servers
M3U and channel imports default to on-demand
XUI-style admin and reseller dashboards
fixes: 502 Bad Gateway after deploys when PM2 restart silently failed
Favicon showed default Next.js triangle instead of NX icon
